---
name: Bug report
about: Something broke. With a seed and a log we can replay your exact game.
labels: bug
---

The engine is deterministic: seed + action log reproduces any game byte-for-byte. The more of the fields below you can fill in, the more likely we watch your bug happen on the first try.

**Seed**
The map seed, shown on the setup screen and in Settings.

**Rules version**
Shown in Settings.

**Game settings**
Map size, lords, fog, turn limit — whatever you picked at setup.

**Action log or save file**
An exported action log or save file, attached. This is the single most useful thing you can give us.

**What happened**
What you did, what you expected, what the game did instead.

**Browser and device**
e.g. Firefox 140 on Windows, Safari on iPhone 15.
